english: The last time I saw you, I thought you were familiar.

name: video_0028_0020
chinese: 你做我独家代理没问题，但是你想入股我的生意，你有这个能力吗？
english: You can be my sole agent, but you want to join my business. Do you have this ability?

name: video_0028_0021
chinese: 好吧好吧，说说吧，你们打算怎么干
english: All right, all right, talk about it. What are you going to do

name: video_0028_0022
chinese: 现在要继续追查下去的方法，只有拿突了
english: Now, the only way to keep tracking down is to take down NaTu

name: video_0028_0023
chinese: 要趁他还在拘留病房抓他出来。
english: Get him out while he's still in the detention room.

name: video_0029_0001
chinese: 说你目前最好的选择是退役
english: Say your best choice at the moment is to retire

name: video_0029_0002
chinese: 我问你的时候你为什么不说？
english: Why didn't you say that when I asked you?

name: video_0029_0003
chinese: 究竟发生什么了
english: What happened?

name: video_0029_0004
chinese: 今天晚上都将是最严峻的考验。
english: Tonight will be the most severe test.

name: video_0029_0005
chinese: 我们应该在A01主战阵地。
english: We should be in the A01 main battle position.

name: video_0029_0006
chinese: 没事干是不是，火场一日游呢
english: Do you have nothing to do? Do you have a day tour in the fire

name: video_0029_0007
chinese: 以后我再也没有机会干这种事了，这牛我得吹一辈子
english: I'll never have a chance to do this again. I have to blow it all my life

name: video_0029_0008
chinese: 火已经逼近化学罐区了
english: The fire is approaching the chemical tank farm

name: video_0029_0009
chinese: 特勤一中队，咱们就在这，打他个攻坚战
english: Secret service No.1 Squadron, let's fight him here

name: video_0029_0010
chinese: 听得见吗，只要我活着，我就会记住你
english: Can you hear me? As long as I live, I will remember you

name: video_0029_0011
chinese: 油压这么高，又有这么多的油，我看是顶不了多长时间了。
english: The oil pressure is so high and there is so much oil. I don't think it will last long.

name: video_0029_0012
chinese: 集合各队指挥员
english: Gather all the team commanders

name: video_0029_0013
chinese: 坦白的说，就是敢死队。
english: Frankly speaking, it's the death squads.

name: video_0029_0014
chinese: 但是我们可以想办法重新打开一条。
english: But we can try to reopen one.

name: video_0029_0015
chinese: 你再带上一个人，攻坚组送你们进去。
english: You take one more person and the team will take you in.

name: video_0029_0016
chinese: 哎，有烟吗
english: Hey, do you have any cigarettes

name: video_0029_0017
chinese: 这是罐区，你找死呢
english: This is the tank farm. You want to die

name: video_0029_0018
chinese: 江立伟，我等你回来喝酒。
english: Jiang Liwei, I'll wait for you to come back for a drink.

name: video_0029_0019
chinese: 我只知道转80圈为一扣，一个阀门100克扣
english: I only know that 80 turns is one button, and 100 button for one valve

name: video_0029_0020
chinese: 你太不了解消防员了。
english: You don't know about fireman.

name: video_0029_0021
chinese: 你好你好，你见过这个小孩吗？带个红色帽子，穿一个深蓝色马甲，这么高，他是我儿子，叫姜淼。
english: Hello hello. Have you seen the child? Take a red hat, wear a dark blue vest, this high, he is my son, Jiang Miao.

name: video_0029_0022
chinese: 我想回家了妈妈
english: I want to go home mom

name: video_0029_0023
chinese: 长大了成为一个顶天立地的男子汉
english: Grow up to be a man

name: video_0029_0024
chinese: 爸，对不起。
english: Dad, I'm sorry.

name: video_0029_0025
chinese: 呜呜呜呜呜呜呜
english: wuwuwu……(cry)

name: video_0029_0026
chinese: 我就想活着出去见我老婆孩子。
english: I want to go out to see my wife and children alive.

name: video_0030_0001
chinese: 起烟了，人肯定在家呢。
english: It's smoking. People must be at home.

name: video_0030_0002
chinese: 我不想吹唢呐
english: I don't want to play suona

name: video_0030_0003
chinese: 你再敢说这话，看老子撕破你的嘴。
english: If you dare to say that again, I will tear your mouth.

name: video_0030_0004
chinese: 磕头，磕啥头
english: Kowtow, kowtow what

name: video_0030_0005
chinese: 你个狗日的，这半瓢水你都吸不干净
english: You're a dog. You can't even suck this half ladle of water

name: video_0030_0006
chinese: 使劲喊哪娃，使劲喊
english: Shout hard, shout hard

name: video_0030_0007
chinese: 娃儿，哪个徒弟不是从娃过来的，老子当年学徒的时候三天都没饭吃。
english: Wah'er, which apprentice didn't come from Wah? I didn't have food for three days when I was an apprentice.

name: video_0030_0008
chinese: 你咋会不知道，你不是都来两个月了吗？
english: Why don't you know? you've been here for two months?

name: video_0030_0009
chinese: 啥好好的，好好的师傅能让你回来？
english: What's good?If you are good,  Shifu can let you come back?

name: video_0030_0010
chinese: 你说你呀，真给我丢脸。
english: I'm ashamed of you.

name: video_0030_0011
chinese: 师娘跟我说让我在家呆两天。
english: Shiniang told me to stay at home for two days.

name: video_0030_0012
chinese: 师傅说让我早去早回
english: Master said that I should go early and return early

name: video_0030_0013
chinese: 妈，这唢呐吹到顶啊，就是领奏，你知道这曲子叫啥不。
english: Ma, at the top of suona playing. It's the leader. You know what the tune is called.

name: video_0030_0014
chinese: 诶，爸，你咋知道嘞
english: Hey, Dad, how do you know

name: video_0030_0015
chinese: 你知道我为啥要让你去学吹唢呐的吗？
english: Do you know why I want you to learn to play suona?

name: video_0030_0016
chinese: 爸，你放心，我一定学会吹百鸟朝凤
english: Dad, don't worry, I will learn to play birds and Phoenix

name: video_0030_0017
chinese: 没那么容易，我听说你师傅前几年收了七八个
english: It's not that easy. I heard that your master collected seven or eight in the past few years

name: video_0030_0018
chinese: 那可不是，这首曲子是唢呐匠的看家本事
english: That's not true. This piece is the skill of Suona craftsman

name: video_0030_0019
chinese: 大叔，师傅给我们俩放假了
english: Uncle, Shifu gave us a holiday

name: video_0030_0020
chinese: 是我师父的太爷传下来的，有几百年了，咱这800里秦川，恐怕是找不出第二支
english: It's passed down by my master's great master. It's been hundreds of years. I'm afraid we can't find the second one in Qinchuan for 800 Li

name: video_0030_0021
chinese: 听见没有，你也来一段
english: Do you hear me? Do you want to have a part, too

name: video_0030_0022
chinese: 学鸟叫
english: Learn to sing like bird

name: video_0030_0023
chinese: 可咱们这黄河岸上不能没有唢呐
english: But we can't live on the Yellow River without suona

name: video_0030_0024
chinese: 所以啊，在咱们这块地盘上，唢呐不能断了种。
english: So, in our territory, suona can't be lost.

name: video_0030_0025
chinese: 既然是匠活，就得有人担起责任
english: Since it's craftsmanship, someone has to take responsibility

name: video_0030_0026
chinese: 他才能拼着命把这活保住，传下去
english: He's going to fight his life to keep this job and pass it on

name: video_0030_0027
chinese: 师傅，是我吹得不够好吗？
english: Master, am I not good enough?

name: video_0030_0028
chinese: 那你为啥要赶我走？
english: Then why are you driving me away?

name: video_0030_0029
chinese: 咱爷俩的缘分就到这儿了。
english: This is where our relationship ends.

name: video_0030_0030
chinese: 典平吹的不如我好，为啥他就能学百鸟朝凤，我不能学
english: Dianping is not as good as me. Why can he learn from birds and Phoenix? I can't

name: video_0030_0031
chinese: 师娘，我走了。
english: Shiniang, I'm leaving.

name: video_0030_0032
chinese: 天明说天明说，他游家班出活，跟我屁相干啊！
english: Tianming says that Tianming says, what he says and do has nothing to do with me!

name: video_0030_0033
chinese: 也就是长生，他是我小学同学。
english: changsheng, he is a classmate of my primary school.

name: video_0030_0034
chinese: 这是我师爷的师爷的师爷传给我的，二三百年了
english: This is from my master's master's master. It's been two or three hundred years

name: video_0030_0035
chinese: 要是师傅让我接班，那唢呐班子早没了。
english: If the master asked me to take over, the suona team would be gone.

name: video_0030_0036
chinese: 就关我的事儿，你想干啥
english: It is my matter, what do you want?

name: video_0030_0037
chinese: 尤天明，你个小狗日的，给老子出来。
english: You tianming you son of a bxxxh, come out!

name: video_0030_0038
chinese: 你别叫师傅，我没你这个徒弟。
english: Don't call me Shifu. I don't have you as an apprentice.

name: video_0030_0039
chinese: 他的所作所为火庄人都看在眼里
english: What he has done is seen by the people of huozhuang

name: video_0030_0040
chinese: 游家班的班主病了，没有力气吹百鸟朝凤
english: The head of Youjia class is ill. He has no strength to play birds and Phoenix

name: video_0030_0041
chinese: 就是民俗文化，简单点说，就是想请你们游家班吹一场唢呐
english: It's folk culture. In short, I want to invite you to play a suona

name: video_0030_0042
chinese: 这活要是成了，了不得啊
english: If this job is done, it will be a great job

name: video_0031_0001
chinese: 他们都是我嘴里的羊，我喜欢怎么吃就怎么吃？
english: They are all sheep in my mouth. I can eat as I like?

name: video_0031_0002
chinese: 门图，你不要再杀战俘了
english: Mento, you don't want to kill any more prisoners

name: video_0031_0003
chinese: 有一天你发现天上多了一颗星星，那就是我找你娘去了
english: One day you found that there was another star in the sky, that is, I went to find your mother

name: video_0031_0004
chinese: 只跟马说话，不跟人说话啊！
english: Talk only to horses, not to people!

name: video_0031_0005
chinese: 那你就当我视频吗就好了，我叫文泰，这个叫朱月，你这匹叫什么？
english: Then you can be my video? My name is Wentai, this is ZhuYue. What's your name?

name: video_0031_0006
chinese: 你要打，就在战场上打
english: If you want to fight, fight on the battlefield

name: video_0031_0007
chinese: 我求你了，求你保守住我的秘密不要让别人知道
english: I beg you, please keep my secret from others

name: video_0031_0008
chinese: 但是我现在明白，他是在磨练我
english: But I understand now that he's honing me

name: video_0031_0009
chinese: 恳请单于，别再分散兵力了
english: Please don't scatter your troops any more

name: video_0031_0010
chinese: 女儿想做魏国的皇后。
english: I wants to be the queen of the state of Wei.

name: video_0031_0011
chinese: 如果我做了皇后，我们就可以和中原人结成友邦了
english: If I become a queen, we can form a friendship with the Central Plains people

name: video_0031_0012
chinese: 我已经失去了很多兄弟，我不能再失去你
english: I've lost a lot of brothers. I can't lose you any more

name: video_0031_0013
chinese: 在战场上绝不能有感情
english: There must be no emotion in the battlefield

name: video_0031_0014
chinese: 大家正等着将军出战呢
english: We're waiting for the general to fight

name: video_0031_0015
chinese: 谁想打仗？我也不想再打仗了。
english: Who wants to fight? I don't want to fight anymore.

name: video_0031_0016
chinese: 如果可以用我的生命去停止这场战争的话，我早就做了。
english: If I could use my life to stop this war, I would have done it.

name: video_0031_0017
chinese: 穿上了将军的战甲，就不再属于你
english: If you put on the general's armor, it won't belong to you

name: video_0031_0018
chinese: 这就是战争。
english: This is war.

name: video_0031_0019
chinese: 此次接近你们，不是为了抢掠
english: I'm not here to rob you

name: video_0031_0020
chinese: 我知道你心里委屈，在草原上奔波多年，聚集了那么多的部族
english: I know you are wronged. You have been running on the grassland for many years, gathering so many tribes

name: video_0031_0021
chinese: 士气低落，不堪再战
english: Low morale, unable to fight again

name: video_0031_0022
chinese: 那也不一定赢啊，我们退吧
english: It doesn't have to win. Let's go

name: video_0031_0023
chinese: 只要取下魏国国土，我就会实现我的抱负
english: As long as I take down the territory of Wei state, I will realize my ambition

name: video_0031_0024
chinese: 从今天起，我门图就是你们的新单于
english: From today on, I am your new king

name: video_0031_0025
chinese: 兵贵神速，我想今夜就动身。
english: I want to start tonight.

name: video_0031_0026
chinese: 我是大卫平北将军花木兰。
english: I'm general Hua Mulan, David Pingbei.

name: video_0031_0027
chinese: 我们的队伍里，有汉人，士人
english: There are Han people and Shi people in our team

name: video_0031_0028
chinese: 我，大维皇第七皇子，拓跋宏
english: I, the seventh Prince of the great Wei emperor, tuobahong

name: video_0031_0029
chinese: 在你的眼里我是吧，所以我们柔然人来说，我是个千古不遇的英雄。
english: In your eyes, I am, so we are gentle people, I am a hero never met.

name: video_0031_0030
chinese: 公主请放心，我是北魏的将军花木兰。
english: Princess, don't worry. I'm Hua Mulan, the general of the Northern Wei Dynasty.

name: video_0031_0031
chinese: 我知道你，你是想用我来救你们的皇子吗？
english: I know you. Do you want to use me to save your prince?

name: video_0031_0032
chinese: 我替父从军只为尽孝
english: I joined the army for my father just to be filial

name: video_0031_0033
chinese: 惟有解决引起战争的祸首，才能停止这场战争。
english: Only by solving the causes of the war can the war be stopped.

name: video_0031_0034
chinese: 我们一起走吧，不管去哪里
english: Let's go, no matter where we go

name: video_0031_0035
chinese: 能用自己的生命去换取这个国家的安宁
english: Can exchange their own lives for the peace of this country

name: video_0032_0001
chinese: 如果有什么不一样的呢，你给我这版为准。
english: If there is anything different, you us my edition as principle.

name: video_0032_0002
chinese: 让不让着你，就你干点事儿，该不该打，自己说
english: Let's not let you do something. Should we fight or not

name: video_0032_0003
chinese: 你们是怎么抓住我的
english: How did you catch me

name: video_0032_0004
chinese: 既然在这儿了，咱聊点有诚意的好吧，你手下那几个人要等到几点告诉我
english: Now that we're here, let's talk with sincerity. OK, how many people under you will tell me

name: video_0032_0005
chinese: 就是这么想的，要活一起活，要死大家一起。
english: That's what I think. We should live together and die together.

name: video_0032_0006
chinese: 那天你们抓人的时候，他路上闹了吗。
english: Did he make trouble on the road when you arrested him that day.

name: video_0032_0007
chinese: 吴先生，你就认倒霉吧
english: Mr. Wu, just accept that you fall on hard time

name: video_0032_0008
chinese: 开了大约...,你别套我了。
english: It's about... You don't want to mess with me.

name: video_0032_0009
chinese: 你枪不错呀，哪儿弄的？给我指个道呗。
english: You have a good gun. Where did you get it? Show me a way.

name: video_0032_0010
chinese: 别找抽了你，接着说。
english: Don't make me beat you, go on speaking.

name: video_0032_0011
chinese: 你手上还有其他人吗？
english: Do you have anyone else on your hand?

name: video_0032_0012
chinese: 你要不想说，我也不跟你废话。
english: If you don't want to talk, I won't talk to you.

name: video_0032_0013
chinese: 住的地方还有一张卡，里面有300万。
english: There's also a card where I live. There's three million in it.

name: video_0032_0014
chinese: 洪先生，我是你的粉丝，特别喜欢你的戏，但是我在网上搜过你，你已经结婚了
english: Mr. Hong, I'm your fan. I like your play very much. But I searched you on the Internet. You're married

name: video_0032_0015
chinese: 我妈也是你的一个大粉丝，他也特别喜欢你的戏。
english: My mother is also a big fan of you. He also likes your play very much.

name: video_0032_0016
chinese: 来吧两位，冰镇的井水
english: Come on, frozen well water

name: video_0032_0017
chinese: 现场情况不能开枪，沿途设的路障也没能堵着他。
english: He could not be shot at the scene or blocked by the barricades along the way.

name: video_0032_0018
chinese: 图个平安
english: seek for a peace

name: video_0032_0019
chinese: 你不是演过赌神的吗？你这样合适吗？
english: Didn't you play the God of gamblers? Is that right for you?

name: video_0032_0020
chinese: 华子，你想单聊的，别绕弯子，人质呢
english: Huazi, you want to talk alone. Don't beat around the bush. Where are the hostages

name: video_0032_0021
chinese: 如果我要死了，最难受的就是我妈了
english: If I'm going to die, the worst thing is my mother

name: video_0032_0022
chinese: 怕，因为看到你真的想做给你看一下
english: I'm afraid, because I really want to show you

name: video_0032_0023
chinese: 你值得吗，这是绑架
english: Are you worth it? It's kidnapping

name: video_0033_0001
chinese: 啊，小姐，请问你喜欢吃凤梨吗？
english: Ah, miss, do you like pineapple?

name: video_0033_0002
chinese: 我台湾来的嘛，你呢
english: I'm from Taiwan. How about you

name: video_0033_0003
chinese: 你不用说，没关系啊，我可以住在这边吗？
english: You don't have to say, it doesn't matter. Can I live here?

name: video_0033_0004
chinese: 我以前交的那个女朋友，我们在一起五年，可是之后呢，她跟我分手，因为她说我根本就不了解他。
english: The girlfriend I made before, we were together for five years, but after that, she broke up with me because she said I didn't know him at all.

name: video_0033_0005
chinese: 大男人一天到晚去跑步，这可不是办法
english: It's not the way for a man to run all day long

name: video_0033_0006
chinese: 老板，一份厨师沙拉
english: Boss, a chef's salad

name: video_0033_0007
chinese: 又是厨师沙拉，每天晚上吃不烦呐
english: It's chef's salad again. I can't eat it every night

name: video_0033_0008
chinese: 炸鱼薯条很好吃
english: Fish and chips are delicious

name: video_0033_0009
chinese: 是不是有个警察每天晚上来这里买厨师沙拉
english: Is there a policeman who comes here every night to buy chef's salad

name: video_0033_0010
chinese: 等了你很长时间，留下一封信说要交给你。
english: After waiting for you for a long time, I left a letter to you.

name: video_0033_0011
chinese: 唉，不要了，这家人太多，你换别的。
english: Oh, no, there are too many people in this family. Please change.

name: video_0033_0012
chinese: 我怕丢了，我帮你收起来了，我没看过。
english: I'm afraid I'll lose it. I'll put it away for you. I haven't seen it.

name: video_0033_0013
chinese: 你表哥真会做生意啊，刚刚开始介绍我买炸鱼薯条，现在连店都让给我了。
english: Your cousin is really good at business. He just introduced me to buy fish and chips. Now he even gave me the shop.

name: video_0034_0001
chinese: 手机没信号。
english: The phone has no signal.

name: video_0034_0002
chinese: 这里的海水平均深度在三千米
english: The average depth of the sea water here is 3000 meters

name: video_0034_0003
chinese: 会有人来救我们吧
english: Someone will come to help us

name: video_0034_0004
chinese: 我们已经偏离航线很远了，没有人会知道我们的位置。
english: We are far off course, no one will know where we are.

name: video_0034_0005
chinese: 你别再说这话了行吗，这是哪儿啊，南极。你爬再高，也没有信号。
english: Can you stop saying that? Where is this, Antarctica. No matter how high you climb, there is no signal.
